zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne於1622年8月8日出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun46歲，母親Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun27歲。她於1639年4月2日與Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1675年5月3日在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne于1622年8月8日出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun46岁，母亲Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun27岁。她于1639年4月2日与Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1675年5月3日在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Diana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of the moon and of hunting, equivalent to the Greek Artemis. In mythology she is characterized as both beautiful and chaste. Her name is of ancient and uncertain derivation. It probably contains a first element that is also found in the name of the Greek god Dionysos ( see Dennis ) and the Latin name of the supreme god Jupiter. It was adopted in Britain during the Tudor period as a learned name, a borrowing from Latin influenced by the French form Diane . Although it was much used by Elizabethan poets celebrating the virgin goddess and alluding to the Virgin Queen, it was not particularly popular as a given name until the end of the 19th century. In earlier centuries some clergymen were reluctant to baptize girls with this pagan name, mindful of the riots against St Paul stirred up by worshippers of Diana of the Ephesians (Acts 19:24–41). In the late 20th century, its popularity received a boost because of its association with the late Diana , Princess of Wales ( 1961–97 ), who was renowned for her beauty, glamour, and compassion.

variants.name: Dianna
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of the moon and of hunting, equivalent to the Greek Artemis. In mythology she is characterized as both beautiful and chaste. Her name is of ancient and uncertain derivation. It probably contains a first element that is also found in the name of the Greek god Dionysos ( see Dennis ) and the Latin name of the supreme god Jupiter. It was adopted in Britain during the Tudor period as a learned name, a borrowing from Latin influenced by the French form Diane . Although it was much used by Elizabethan poets celebrating the virgin goddess and alluding to the Virgin Queen, it was not particularly popular as a given name until the end of the 19th century. In earlier centuries some clergymen were reluctant to baptize girls with this pagan name, mindful of the riots against St Paul stirred up by worshippers of Diana of the Ephesians (Acts 19:24–41). In the late 20th century, its popularity received a boost because of its association with the late Diana , Princess of Wales ( 1961–97 ), who was renowned for her beauty, glamour, and compassion.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne was born on 8 August 1622, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun, was 46 and her mother, Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, was 27. She married Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury on 2 April 1639, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 3 May 1675, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne est née le 8 août 1622, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury le 2 avril 1639, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1675, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne am 8. August 1622 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun 46 und ihre Mutter Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun 27. Sie hat am 2. April 1639 in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1675 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne è nata il il 8 agosto 1622 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury il 2 aprile 1639, nel Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1675, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourneが1622年8月8日にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletounは46歳，母Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletounは27歳であった。1639年4月2日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターでReverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1675年5月3日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne(이)가 1622년 8월 8일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1639년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.08 Aug 1622–3 May 1675: 8 de agosto de 1622–3 de maio de 1675
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne nasceu em 8 de agosto de 1622, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury em 2 de abril de 1639, em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1675, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne родилась 8 августа 1622 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury 2 апреля 1639 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 3 мая 1675 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.08 Aug 1622–3 May 1675: 8 de agosto de 1622–3 de mayo de 1675
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Diana Maxwell Viscountess of Cranbourne nació el 8 de agosto de 1622, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Reverend Lord Charles Cecil, Second Earl of Salisbury el 2 de abril de 1639, en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1675, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
